auth.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid mainland China phone number.
auth.invalidCredentials: Incorrect phone number or password. Please try again.
auth.invalidRequest: The login request is invalid. Please review your input and try again.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.
auth.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
auth.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access UAAD
auth.errorMsg: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

public.searchPlaceholder: Search artists, shows, and sports events
public.emptyDescription: Try another keyword, city, or category. We are continuously aggregating more events.
public.errorDescription: The content is temporarily unavailable. Please refresh and try again later.

home.selectedTitle: Recommendations first, hot ranking as fallback
home.selectedDescription: The homepage spotlight prefers the recommendation API and falls back to hot activities whenever personalized data is unavailable.
home.selectedEmptyDescription: Recommendations are temporarily unavailable. You can still explore the latest activities through categories and the activity plaza.

masters.title: Masters Collection
masters.subtitle: Immersive art showcases with a city-scale cultural atmosphere
masters.description: The first hero slide leans into exhibition energy, using a refined visual tone to match the Figma homepage rhythm and frame premium cultural content.

stadium.title: Live Stadium
stadium.subtitle: Hit tours and a sea of lights ready for the night
stadium.description: The second slide shifts into a high-contrast concert scene, highlighting popular live tours and crowd-driven energy to strengthen the homepage hero flow.

sports.title: Match Pulse
sports.subtitle: Headline fixtures with a rising home-city atmosphere
sports.description: The third slide focuses on sports, keeping the motion-heavy framing and clear CTA so the hero area stays consistent across every activity category.

home.mapHint: Hover for detail, click to drill down
home.mapError: The map resources could not be loaded. Please refresh and try again.
home.categoryTitle: Whatever you need, we have it
home.categoryDescription: Shows, sports, kids, exhibitions, and live music are all spread across the homepage. Hover to preview each category image, then click to open the activity plaza with that filter already applied.
home.categoryCardHint: Hover to preview, click to filter instantly

selectedConcert.title: Selected Activity 01 · Immersive concert under the beam field
selectedConcert.summary: A large-scale stage experience with synchronized audience atmosphere, used here as fixed mock content to lock the first featured slot structure, image ratio, and text density.

selectedSports.title: Selected Activity 02 · Championship night home showdown
selectedSports.summary: The second alternating featured block preserves the Figma layout while emphasizing match information, schedule, and CTA space for future real sports data.

selectedExhibition.title: Selected Activity 03 · Night exhibition with curated special units
selectedExhibition.summary: The third featured block also uses fixed mock imagery and copy so the homepage keeps its full visual rhythm before the real recommendation feed is connected.

activities.keywordPlaceholder: Search by event name or keyword

activityDetail.loadError: Unable to load activity details. Please try again later.
activityDetail.notFound: Activity details are not available. It may be offline or removed.
activityDetail.emptyDescription: This activity may be offline, removed, or not ready to display yet.
activityDetail.invalidDescription: The activity id in this link is invalid. Please return to the activity list and choose again.
activityDetail.errorDescription: The network or service is temporarily unavailable. Please retry in a moment.
activityDetail.descriptionFallback: Activity details are still being completed. For now, this page focuses on registration timing, stock, and key facts.
activityDetail.heroSummaryFallback: This activity page is still being refined, with timing, stock, and registration state shown first.
activityDetail.locationDescription: Review the venue details and map preview here, then continue into your preferred navigation app before departure.
activityDetail.mapUnavailable: Precise coordinates are not available for this activity yet, but you can still open the venue in an external map.
activityDetail.stockHintAmple: Stock is still relatively healthy, so you can comfortably follow the registration rhythm.
activityDetail.stockHintTight: Stock is being consumed quickly. Keep a close eye on the next status change.
activityDetail.stockHintSoldOut: Current stock is sold out. The page will keep polling in case any inventory returns.
activityDetail.stockPendingSync: Stock data will keep syncing after the next polling cycle.
activityDetail.countdownSoldOutHint: Currently sold out, while the registration window still closes at {{time}}
activityDetail.soldOutHint: This activity has no remaining enrollment stock right now. You can head back and explore other events.
activityDetail.closedHint: This activity is not in an active enrollment phase right now. Check back if a new window opens.
activityDetail.reminderHint: This activity is still warming up. Sign in to keep a reminder on this device.
activityDetail.reminderHintReady: This activity is still in preheat. Save the reminder now and come back when enrollment opens.
activityDetail.reminderSavedHint: Your reminder is saved on this device so you can come back when enrollment opens.
activityDetail.reminderExists: A reminder is already saved for this activity.
activityDetail.loginHint: Sign in to submit enrollment and continue straight to the payment page.
activityDetail.paymentHint: After submission, we will take you straight into the payment flow while the order is still valid.
activityDetail.enrollSubmitted: Your enrollment was submitted. Preparing the payment entry now.
activityDetail.enrollError: Enrollment failed for now. Please try again shortly.
activityDetail.actionUpcomingHint: Registration opens at {{time}}. For now, you can follow the countdown and pre-sale stock state.
activityDetail.actionPendingHint: This page already reflects stock, countdown, and status details. The registration flow will be connected in a follow-up module.
activityDetail.actionSoldOutHint: Current inventory is sold out. The page will continue low-frequency polling in case stock returns.
activityDetail.actionClosedHint: The registration window for this activity has ended. This page remains available for reference only.
activityDetail.actionUnavailableHint: The current activity status is "{{status}}", so registration is not open right now.
activityDetail.pollingSelling: Stock will auto-refresh while registration is live
activityDetail.pollingUpcoming: Stock will refresh at a lower frequency before registration opens
activityDetail.pollingSoldOut: The page will keep checking at a lower frequency for inventory returns
activityDetail.pollingStopped: No further stock polling is needed at this stage

notifications.subtitle: Review enrollment updates, payment reminders, and activity alerts in one place.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.subtitle: Review pending payments, completed purchases, and expiration times in one place.
orders.loadError: Unable to load orders right now. Please try again later.
orders.detailLoadError: Unable to load order details right now. Please try again later.
orders.detailUnavailable: This order is unavailable. It may have expired or been removed.
orders.detailSubtitle: Your order is ready. Complete payment to secure the enrollment.
orders.emptyDescription: Orders will appear here after you submit an enrollment.
orders.nextStepPending: This order is still valid and can be paid right away.
orders.nextStepPaid: Payment is complete and your spot is secured.
orders.nextStepClosed: This order can no longer be paid. You can head back and choose another activity.
orders.paidSummary: Payment is already complete. No further action is needed.
orders.closedSummary: This order is closed and the payment entry is no longer available.
orders.paySuccess: Payment completed and the order status has been updated.
orders.cancelConfirm: Cancel this pending order? The spot will be released and the order will be closed.
orders.cancelSuccess: Order cancelled and the spot has been released.
orders.cancelError: Unable to cancel right now. Please try again.

enrollStatus.title: Enrollment Status
enrollStatus.loadError: Unable to load enrollment status right now. Please try again later.
enrollStatus.queueDescription: Your request is already in the system. We'll refresh this page when the status changes.
enrollStatus.cancelConfirm: Cancel this queued enrollment? The spot will be released.
enrollStatus.cancelSuccess: Queue cancelled and the spot has been released.
enrollStatus.cancelError: Unable to cancel right now. Please try again.
enrollStatus.cancelledDescription: This enrollment has been cancelled, and the reserved spot has been released.
enrollStatus.successDescription: Your order is ready, and you can continue to payment now.
enrollStatus.failedDescription: This enrollment did not complete. You can go back and choose another activity.

profile.subtitle: Review your account details, avatar, and session status.
profile.loadError: Profile data is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
profile.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
profile.emailUnavailable: No email saved yet. You can store one on this device here.
profile.securityDescription: This page reads your account profile and lets you store an avatar and email on this device.

settings.notificationsDescription: Choose which channels should keep activity reminders enabled.
settings.emailNotificationsHint: Keep your email reminder preference on this device.
settings.smsNotificationsHint: Keep your SMS reminder preference on this device.
settings.languageDescription: Switch the site language and apply it immediately.
settings.discoveryDescription: Set the default city used by the activity plaza.
settings.accountDescription: Manage local personalization and how you leave the current session.

footer.brandDescription: A unified layer for shows, sports, exhibitions, and city experiences so users can find the next live event faster.
footer.serviceCoverage: Public discovery, search, recommendations, and notification reminders
footer.contactDescription: If you want to onboard more ticketing sources, merchant events, or collaboration data, reach out to the team below.

merchant.dashboardSubtitle: Track your activity metrics and publishing cadence.
merchant.listSubtitle: Manage activity details, status, and publish actions.
merchant.listDescription: Drafts, published activities, and enrollment progress are synced here in one place.
merchant.createSubtitle: Fill activity details and save as draft.
merchant.editSubtitle: Update activity details and save changes.
merchant.publishSuccess: Activity published and the list status is now refreshed.
merchant.loadingDescription: Fetching the latest activity status and form data now.
merchant.empty: No activities yet. Create your first one.
merchant.emptyDescription: Once you create an activity, your drafts, published items, and enrollment data will appear here.
merchant.networkError: Network error. Please try again in a moment.
merchant.publishFailed: Unable to publish this activity right now. Please try again later.
merchant.listLoadFailed: Unable to load your merchant activities right now.
merchant.dashboardLoadFailed: Unable to load merchant overview data right now.
merchant.invalidIdDescription: The activity id is invalid or this activity can no longer be edited. Please return to the list and choose another one.
merchant.editLoadFailed: Unable to read the activity details right now. Please try again later.
merchant.guardDescription: Your current account is not a MERCHANT, so it cannot access the merchant console or merchant activity pages.

form.title: Title
form.requiredHint: * Required fields receive full validation before submit
form.titleRequired: Enter an activity title. Blank spaces alone are not allowed.
form.descriptionRequired: Enter an activity description. Blank spaces alone are not allowed.
form.locationRequired: Enter a location. Blank spaces alone are not allowed.
form.capacityInvalid: Capacity must be an integer greater than 0.
form.priceInvalid: Price must be 0 or more with up to two decimal places.
form.coverUrlInvalid: Enter a valid http(s) image URL.
form.datetimeRequired: Enter a valid date and time.
form.timeInvalid: Invalid timeline: start < end < activity time is required.
form.lockedNotice: Once an activity has entered a published state, capacity and enrollment start time can no longer be edited.
form.capacityLocked: This activity is already in a published state, so capacity is locked.
form.enrollOpenAtLocked: This activity is already in a published state, so enrollment start time is locked.
